---
title: "Measuring Coevolution"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
    css: style.css
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Introduction

```{r}
1:30

```

## Phenotypic data

## Background parameters

### $n_i$

### $G_i$

### $\theta_i$

## Estimating Selection

## Hypothesis Testing
